title: Definitions
doc_html:
§1205.2. Definitions

            For the purpose of this Part, the following terms shall have the following meanings unless the context clearly indicates otherwise:

            (1) "Department" means the Louisiana Department of Health.

            (2) "Health professional shortage areas" means areas so classified by the United States Public Health Services as areas with a shortage of health professionals.

            (3) "Primary health care practitioner" means a medical practitioner who provides a basic level of health care, including but not limited to a general practitioner, internist, obstetrician, gynecologist, and pediatrician, as well as a nonphysician provider such as a nurse and advanced nursing specialist.

            (4) "Secretary" means the secretary of the Louisiana Department of Health.

            Acts 1991, No. 502, §1; Acts 2009, No. 383, §1, eff. July 6, 2009; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1300.2 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
doc_text:
§1205.2.  Definitions
For the purpose of this Part, the following terms shall have the following meanings
unless the context clearly indicates otherwise:
(1)  "Department" means the Louisiana Department of Health.
(2)  "Health professional shortage areas" means areas so classified by the United
States Public Health Services as areas with a shortage of health professionals.
(3)  "Primary health care practitioner" means a medical practitioner who provides a
basic level of health care, including but not limited to a general practitioner, internist,
obstetrician, gynecologist, and pediatrician, as well as a nonphysician provider such as a
nurse and advanced nursing specialist.
(4)  "Secretary" means the secretary of the Louisiana Department of Health.
Acts 1991, No. 502, §1; Acts 2009, No. 383, §1, eff. July 6, 2009; Redesignated from
R.S. 40:1300.2 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
